title: 【奪權101】巴西黑幫：政府唔肯宵禁，我哋肯，今晚唔好畀我哋見到你出街。

replies.msg:
巴西政府同好多人都唔肯積極面對武漢肺炎，所以巴西嘅黑幫就乘勢進攻，喺街道上不斷廣播：

//
“We’re imposing a curfew because nobody is taking this seriously,” the message said, according to Extra’s Tuesday story. “Whoever is in the street screwing around or going for a walk will receive a corrective and serve as an example. Better to stay home doing nothing. The message has been given.”

「因爲冇人認真抗疫，所以我哋而家實施宵禁。邊個仲喺條街到周圍貢嘅，你哋會『被更正』，而作示範。留喺屋企。完。」

“Attention all residents of Rio das Pedras, Muzema and Tijuquinha! Curfew from 8pm today. Whoever is seen on the street after this time will learn to respect the next one,” one threatening message reads.

「全部Rio das Pedras，Muzema，同Tijuquinha嘅居民同我聽住！今晚8點鐘開始宵禁。邊個8點後仲喺條街到嘅將會學識點樣尊重聽日嘅宵禁。」
//



https://twitter.com/AndrewCesare/status/1242174265547468803
https://www.reuters.com/article/us-health-coronavirus-brazil-favelas-fea/gangs-call-curfews-as-coronavirus-hits-rio-favelas-idUSKBN21B3EV
https://nypost.com/2020/03/24/brazilian-gang-institutes-curfew-in-city-of-god-slum-amid-coronavirus/
https://www.rt.com/news/483943-gangs-impose-curfew-rio-favelas/

香港政府同好多人都唔肯積極面對武漢肺炎，所以香港嘅黑警就乘勢進攻，喺街道上不斷廣播：
「因爲冇人認真抗疫，所以我哋而家實施宵禁。邊個仲喺條街到周圍貢嘅，你哋會『被更正』，而作示範。留喺屋企。完。」
「全部香港嘅居民同我聽住！今晚8點鐘開始宵禁。邊個8點後仲喺條街到嘅將會學識點樣尊重聽日嘅宵禁。」
